meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: Qualcomm inks deal for AI startup Modular to bolster software stack, data center buildout
news.summary: Qualcomm is looking to expand its position in the data center market as AI demand skyrockets.

news.headline: We're buying the dip in a stock that we have been itching to get bigger in
news.summary: The selloff is finally giving us a chance to build up this tiny position around our initial cost basis.

news.headline: Brent hits lowest since before start of Iran war on expectations of smoother oil flows via Hormuz - Reuters
news.summary: Brent hits lowest since before start of Iran war on expectations of smoother oil flows via Hormuz  Reuters

news.headline: Qatar PM in Oman to pave way for Iran-Gulf-Iraq Hormuz talks - Reuters
news.summary: Qatar PM in Oman to pave way for Iran-Gulf-Iraq Hormuz talks  Reuters

news.headline: Treasury Secretary Bessent says U.S. GDP growth can return to 3% before end of the year
news.summary: Bessent sees his "3-3-3" plan as still in reach — 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP rate, and a 3 million barrels per day increase in oil production.

news.headline: IAEA chief says Iran inspections will go ahead, working on modalities - Reuters
news.summary: IAEA chief says Iran inspections will go ahead, working on modalities  Reuters

news.headline: AI Stock Theme Splits as Mega-Cap Leaders Wilt and Turnaround Plays Surge
news.summary: AI stocks show divergence: mega-caps like Nvidia and Microsoft stumble while AMD and Intel surge on momentum and turnaround bets, signaling a shift toward value and recovery plays.

news.headline: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as SpaceX stock falls
news.summary: A broad market selloff pushed Musk's net worth below $1 trillion, to $957 billion, according to Bloomberg

news.headline: Apple Stock Polishing New Buy Zone With All-Time High In Sight
news.summary: Regaining support at its 21-day exponential moving average, Apple stock is shaking off a spat of turbulence.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $714.25 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $735.83 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $714.25 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: COIN PUT — enter $8.72–$9.64, target $13.77+, stop $5.51.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.08% and SPY +0.31%. Composite sentiment +26 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), spy trend, vix. VIX at 14.65 (-0.7%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Healthcare (+1.90%) is leading while Financials (-1.89%) lags. Premarket strength in LLY, AMZN; weakness in COIN, XOM. The desk's highest-conviction setup is COIN (6.3/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
